race.comment: CAN'T BE REEL (3) has filled a minor placing at both runs to date, the latest when beaten 1.4 lengths into third over 1200m at Mornington. A win looks close and he'll roll forward to take plenty of catching. SATTVA (12) is a four-start maiden who was just fair fresh at Moe but could improve on slightly firmer footing having battled on the heavy 10 there. Respecting for the top yard. GOLD NUGGET (10) wasn't bad at Moe last start, again on a heavy 10, showing speed and boxing on for a solid fourth. She can roll forward and prove competitive again. COSMIC DYNASTY (9) is a possible improver third up.
